headline: Independent Identity Design Practice
supportingCopy: Character-driven identity design for teams, schools, and brands.
studioPositioningCopy: Athaya Designed is the personal design practice of Ahmad Athaya Nurhani, an identity designer specializing in athletic branding, mascot logos, lettermarks, and visual identity systems. Built from years inside gaming, sports, and creative communities, Athaya Designed focuses on creating marks that feel distinctive, polished, and made to represent something bigger than just a logo.
founderNoteHeadline: A personal practice shaped by gaming, sports, creative communities, and polished identity systems.
founderNoteParagraphs: From gaming and sports communities to polished identity systems for teams, schools, communities, and brands, the practice keeps the bold character of that early work while giving it stronger structure and presentation.
The practice is focused on marks with character, craft, presence, and structure: logos, mascots, lettermarks, athletic identities, and brand tools that feel distinctive and built for long-term use.

beliefPrinciples.title: Character
beliefPrinciples.description: A strong identity should carry a clear point of view.

beliefPrinciples.title: Craft
beliefPrinciples.description: Every mark should be built with detail, discipline, and intention.

beliefPrinciples.title: Presence
beliefPrinciples.description: A good identity should hold up across every environment.

beliefPrinciples.title: Structure
beliefPrinciples.description: A complete system makes the identity easier to use, scale, and protect.

ctaHeadline: Build A Mark With Character And Presence.
